reasoning: The deadline for this question is April 19, 2025. As of April 13, 2025, while Ukraine has accepted the US-proposed 30-day ceasefire, Russia has clearly stalled and refused to do likewise, stating they have not received answers to their 'key questions' and remaining firm on their conditions. A recent April 11 report from the Atlantic Council notes that 'Putin is in no hurry to end his invasion' and 'Russia refuses' an unconditional ceasefire. Furthermore, Russia has continued to intensify attacks. With only 6 days remaining to secure and announce an agreement covering *all* theaters of military conflict, and given that the market was already down to ~4% over ten days ago, the chance of this happening by the deadline is essentially negligible. I am going with the lowest allowed forecast of 2%.
